pre:code-review.prompt: REVIEW MODE — make NO edits. Run a code-simplifier pass on the changed files ({files}). Propose only conservative, behavior-preserving simplifications for clarity, consistency, and maintainability — for each: file:line, current shape, simpler shape, one-line rationale. Return a concise ranked list; if a file is already simple, say so.

pre:commit.shell: git reset HEAD -- package.json package-lock.json 2>/dev/null || true
